name: Insulation Testers — Hand-Driven
description: Rugged hand-driven generator type insulation testers in metal and wooden body variants, from 100 V to 10 kV test voltages. The original CIE design — built and calibrated in Howrah since 1963.

name: Multirange Insulation Testers (Hand-Driven)
description: Multi-voltage, selectable-range hand-driven insulation testers with built-in continuity range. Available in MR-1 through MR-8 series covering a wide range of voltage and insulation range combinations.

name: Motor-Operated Insulation Testers
description: Motorised generator type insulation testers for sustained high-voltage testing up to 10 kV. Motor-cum-hand driven variants offer dual operation modes.

name: Multirange Motorised Insulation Testers
description: Dual-scale multi-voltage motorised insulation testers. MR-A through MR-E series with inner/outer scale display for multiple test voltage and range combinations.

name: Compact / Economical Insulation Testers
description: Economical bakelite and compact metal body hand-driven insulation testers for everyday site and workshop use at 100 V to 1000 V.

name: Earth Resistance Testers
description: Analog and digital earth resistance testers for 3-terminal earth resistance and soil resistivity measurement. Includes hand-driven analog instruments supplied as a complete kit, and digital models with direct numerical readout.

name: Digital Insulation Testers
description: Microcontroller-based digital insulation testers with LCD display, DAR and PI functions, rechargeable battery option, and test voltages from 100 V up to 5000 V.

name: Micro-Ohm Meters
description: 4-terminal (Kelvin) digital micro-ohm meter for precise low-resistance and contact-resistance measurement. Seven-segment LED display, multiple test-current ranges, and direct readout in micro-ohms.

name: Clamp Meters & Multimeters
description: True-RMS clamp meters up to 1000 A AC/DC and 3½-digit digital multimeters for voltage, current, resistance, capacitance, and temperature measurement.

name: HV Test Sets
description: AC high-voltage test sets for cable and equipment insulation testing up to 5 kV. Continuously variable output voltage with analog metering and toggle trip.

name: Phase Sequence Indicators
description: Phase sequence indicators for verifying the phase rotation of 3-phase AC supplies. Disc-rotating type and compact ABS moulded variants.

name: Oil Test Sets — CIE/7000 Series
description: Transformer oil dielectric strength (BDV) testers from 50 kV to 120 kV. Manual and motorised variants with options for digital display and magnetic stirrer.

name: Relay Test Sets
description: Single-phase and three-phase relay test sets for commissioning and testing of protection relays. Variable AC/DC current and voltage sources with phase angle control.
